title: New Chinese Ink Poster
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for vertical new Chinese ink posters with large white space, controlled Chinese typography, restrained luxury palettes, and commercial-ready layout discipline.

zh-CN.title: 新中式水墨极简海报
zh-CN.description: 9:16 竖版新中式水墨极简海报,强调奇峻山水、大留白、低饱和青绿雾蓝色系、可读中文标题和奢华商业质感。
